title: Standing Infront of A Freight … Ship
section_path: Standing Infront of A Freight … Ship
section_path_text: Standing Infront of A Freight … Ship
summary:
Main
With Fronthaul Capesize time charter rates today closing on 100,000/day, the narrative in dry bulk has clearly changed. The idea of a temporary spike, a "run on the mill" rally of some kind, is clearly not anymore in the mind of most investors and industry participants alike. Something else is happening, and although theories are always ample, the cold reality is simple: this is shipping.
